title: 2026 Grammy predictions: Odds favor Bad Bunny, Lady Gaga, and 'KPop'
text: According to Gold Derby's official Grammy predictions, Lady Gaga is favored to win Record of the Year for her song "Abracadabra," with a 44% probability of winning. It would be the 14-time winner's first time taking home the award — or any of the top three categories. Complete Record of the Year Nominees and Odds: 1. "Abracadabra" — Lady Gaga — 44% 2. "DTMF" — Bad Bunny 3. "Manchild" — Sabrina Carpenter 4. "Anxiety" — Doechii 5. "Wildflower" — Billie Eilish 6. "Luther" — Kendrick Lamar with SZA 7. "The Subway" — Chappell Roan 8. "Apt." — Rosé and Bruno Mars. The prediction comes as part of Gold Derby's comprehensive Grammy analysis, which also forecasts Bad Bunny winning Album of the Year for DTMF and "Golden" from KPop Demon Hunters taking Song of the Year honors.
